Class ModifierCard

java.lang.Object
nongui.baseentity.BaseCard
nongui.baseentity.TriggerCard
nongui.baseentity.cards.ModifierCard.ModifierCard
Direct Known Subclasses:
Deny, FlashFreeze, ForDemacia, ShapedStone, TwinDisciplines
public class ModifierCard extends TriggerCard
Represents a Modifier Card in the game. This card acts as a trigger that can alter the outcome of a roll or an event by applying either a positive or a negative modifier based on the player's choice.

  • Constructor Details

    • ModifierCard

      public ModifierCard()
      Default constructor for ModifierCard. Initializes the card with default positive (+2) and negative (-2) modifier values.

    • ModifierCard

      public ModifierCard(String name, String flavorText, int positiveModifier, int negativeModifier)
      Parameterized constructor to create a specific ModifierCard.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the modifier card.
      flavorText - The lore or background text.
      positiveModifier - The value applied for a positive effect.
      negativeModifier - The value applied for a negative effect.

  • Method Details

    • useModifier

      public int useModifier()
      Prompts the user via the GUI to choose between the positive or negative effect.
      Returns:
      The chosen modifier value (positive, negative, or 0 if canceled/invalid).
